response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and open-source experience, there is no evidence of modern C++ or Rust development in commercial geospatial or routing systems, nor demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, routing tiles, or navigation data pipelines — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in GIS and geospatial platforms
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Experience with high-performance systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in routing or map data pipelines
Lack of evidence in distributed systems, consistency, or fault tolerance for global routing data
Geospatial work is primarily web-based GIS, not routing tile optimization or navigation systems
